Case# vmnet_return_t.VMNET_SETUP_INCOMPLETE

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.10+

```
case VMNET_SETUP_INCOMPLETE
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/vmnet/vmnet_return_t/vmnet_setup_incomplete#Discussion)

Indicates failure due to an incomplete interface setup.
